description: Legal record (#69) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 23r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dating: Tishrei–Ḥeshvan 5325 AM, based on the date mentioned in the previous two entries: (27 [El]ul 5324 CE) and Ḥeshvan [5325 AM]. Partnership dissolution in which Yiṣḥaq b. David al-Kohen and Yosef b. Ṣedaqa al-Naqqash release each other from further monetary claims other than those described in the previous two entries of the court register regarding their debt settlement. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
